title: Theo's Mixed-Up Morning
synopsis: When toddler Theo tries to get dressed by himself, everything goes hilariously wrong until his patient family helps him figure it out, teaching him that asking for help is brave and that learning new things takes practice.

pages.text: Theo woke up happy and excited. Today he wanted to get dressed all by himself! "I'm a big boy now," he said proudly. He looked at his clothes on the chair and felt very brave.

illustration.description: A cheerful South Asian toddler boy with dark curly hair sits up in bed, stretching his arms with a big smile. His bedroom has bright blue walls with toy trains on shelves, and morning sunlight streams through yellow curtains. A pile of colorful clothes sits on a small wooden chair nearby.
illustration.alt: Happy toddler Theo waking up in his bright bedroom

pages.text: First, Theo tried to put on his shirt. But something was wrong! His head got stuck, and he couldn't see anything. "Help!" he called, feeling a little scared. The shirt was on backwards and upside down!

illustration.description: Theo stands in the middle of his room with a bright red shirt completely covering his head and twisted around backwards. His little arms stick out at funny angles, and you can see his bare tummy. The scene is drawn with warm, soft lighting and rounded shapes to keep it gentle and funny rather than frightening.
illustration.alt: Theo tangled up in his backwards shirt

pages.text: Mama came running when she heard Theo call. She had beautiful long black hair and kind brown eyes. "Oh my!" she laughed gently. "Let's fix this together." She carefully helped Theo turn his shirt the right way. Theo felt happy again when he could see!

illustration.description: A loving South Asian mother with long black hair in a bright yellow dress kneels down to help Theo with his shirt. She has a warm, patient smile and gentle hands. Theo's face shows relief and happiness as his head pops through the correct opening. The room is filled with soft morning light and cheerful colors.
illustration.alt: Mama helping Theo with his shirt

pages.text: Next came the pants. Theo sat on the floor and tried to put them on. But they felt funny! He looked down and started to giggle. He had put both legs through the same hole! "I look silly," Theo laughed.

illustration.description: Theo sits on a soft blue rug, wearing his red shirt properly now, but with both legs squeezed into one leg of his green pants. His expression shows surprise turning into giggles. The other pant leg dangles empty beside him. The scene has a playful, lighthearted mood with bright primary colors throughout the room.
illustration.alt: Theo with both legs in one pant leg, giggling

pages.text: Papa heard the giggling and came to see. He was tall with a warm smile and wore glasses. "What's so funny in here?" he asked. When he saw Theo's pants, he chuckled too. "Those are some special pants! Should we try again?" Papa asked kindly.

illustration.description: A tall South Asian father with glasses and a neat beard stands in the doorway, wearing a purple sweater. He has a gentle, amused expression as he looks at Theo's pants situation. Mama is still kneeling nearby, and all three family members are smiling. The composition shows the loving family dynamic with warm, inviting colors.
illustration.alt: Papa arriving to see Theo's funny pants predicament

pages.text: With Mama and Papa's help, Theo learned the trick to putting on pants. "One leg, then the other leg," Papa showed him slowly. Theo felt proud when he got it right! "I did it!" he cheered. Sometimes asking for help is the bravest thing to do.

illustration.description: Theo stands triumphantly between his parents, fully dressed in his red shirt and green pants, with his arms raised in celebration. Mama and Papa are clapping and smiling proudly. The room is bathed in golden morning light, and everyone's faces show joy and accomplishment. The overall mood is one of family love and success.
illustration.alt: Theo successfully dressed with proud parents celebrating

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Theo feel when he woke up?
questions.explanation: Theo woke up happy and excited because he wanted to get dressed all by himself!

questions.question: What happened when Theo tried to put on his shirt?
choices: It got stuck on his head
questions.explanation: Theo's shirt got stuck because he put it on backwards and upside down!

questions.question: How did Theo feel when Mama helped him?
questions.explanation: Theo felt happy when Mama helped him fix his shirt and he could see again!

questions.question: What did Theo learn about asking for help?
questions.explanation: Theo learned that sometimes asking for help is the bravest thing to do!

pages.instructions: Choose the right word to complete each sentence!

pages.instructions: Pick the best word for each sentence!
